name: First-Layer Decision Brief and TrustMap Snapshot
purpose: Create the first screen pattern for CyberShield Executive OS: Decision Brief on the left, TrustMap Snapshot on the right, proof details underneath.
governing_doctrine: Decision first. Map beside it. Proof underneath.
trustmap_rule: The TrustMap should not ask the user to discover the decision. The TrustMap should help the user understand and challenge the decision.
target_9_second_read: What action is allowed, constrained, escalated, or refused

responsive_layout.desktop: Decision Brief left, TrustMap Snapshot right, details below
responsive_layout.tablet: Decision Brief first, TrustMap Snapshot second, details below
responsive_layout.mobile: Decision Brief first, collapsed TrustMap Snapshot underneath, details below

sample_decision_brief.what_cybershield_thinks_is_happening: CyberShield detected a high-consequence action with missing or unverified evidence.
sample_decision_brief.why_it_matters: A consequential action may proceed without sufficient proof, owner confirmation, or verified evidence.
sample_decision_brief.risk_if_wrong: High financial, operational, compliance, or reputational consequence if the action is trusted too early.
sample_decision_brief.next_action: Assign the required owner, verify missing evidence, and generate a decision record before proceeding.
sample_decision_brief.model_trace: Expert-Derived V1 models. Weights are calibratable and not statistically validated.

affected_domains.label: Identity
affected_domains.reason: approval authority and access context affect action admissibility

affected_domains.label: Vendor
affected_domains.reason: vendor proof or contract evidence may be stale or missing

affected_domains.label: Consequence
affected_domains.reason: risk if wrong is high enough to escalate

trustmap_snapshot.evidence_gap: Human verification or required proof not yet attached
trustmap_snapshot.human_approval_path: Assigned owner -> qualified reviewer -> decision record -> Proof Pack

details_below.label: Why this matters
details_below.content: CyberShield is not a visualization tool first. It is a trust decision system that tells leaders whether an action can be relied on before consequence.

details_below.label: Missing evidence
details_below.content: Required verification evidence, owner approval, and documented limitations are not yet complete.

details_below.label: Recommended next action
details_below.content: Escalate to the assigned owner and attach verification evidence before relying on the action.

details_below.label: Model trace
details_below.content: Inspect the Expert-Derived V1 model, version, inputs, factor weights, missing evidence, assumptions, confidence, and reliance risk.

details_below.label: Proof Pack
details_below.content: Generate or review the decision record, evidence trace, caveats, and defensibility summary.

non_negotiables: Do not add a new top-level tab
Do not replace the full TrustMap workspace
Do not show the full TrustMap universe on the first layer
Decision Brief comes before or beside TrustMap Snapshot
TrustMap Snapshot is compact and decision-specific
Details live underneath the first layer
Do not claim live scoring, live evidence retrieval, live enforcement, statistical validation, CMMC certification, healthcare compliance validation, or live integrations
boundary: Static advisory prototype only. The first-layer Decision Brief and TrustMap Snapshot are demo scaffolds. They do not perform live scoring, live evidence retrieval, statistical validation, workflow automation, ticketing, notification, backend persistence, or enforcement.
